2604.03330.title: AICCE: AI Driven Compliance Checker Engine
2604.03330.paper_summary: For digital infrastructure to be safe, compatible, and standards-aligned, automated communication protocol compliance verification is crucial. Nevertheless, current rule-based systems are becoming less and less effective since they are unable to identify subtle or intricate non-compliance, which attackers frequently use to establish covert communication channels in IPv6 traffic. In order to automate IPv6 compliance verification, this paper presents the Artificial Intelligence Driven Compliance Checker Engine (AICCE), a novel generative system that combines dual-architecture reasoning and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Specification segments pertinent to each query can be efficiently retrieved thanks to the semantic encoding of protocol standards into a high-dimensional vector space. Based on this framework, AICCE offers two complementary pipelines: (i) Explainability Mode, which uses parallel LLM agents to render decisions and settle disputes through organized discussions to improve interpretability and robustness, and (ii) Script Execution Mode, which converts clauses into Python rules that can be executed quickly for dataset-wide verification. With the debate mechanism enhancing decision reliability in complicated scenarios and the script-based pipeline lowering per-sample latency, AICCE achieves accuracy and F1-scores of up to 99% when tested on IPv6 packet samples across sixteen cutting-edge generative models. By offering a scalable, auditable, and generalizable mechanism for identifying both routine and covert non-compliance in dynamic communication environments, our results show that AICCE overcomes the blind spots of conventional rule-based compliance checking systems.
2604.03330.paper_summary_zh: 為了使數位基礎設施安全、相容且符合標準，自動化的通訊協議合規性驗證至關重要。儘管如此，當前的基於規則的系統變得越來越無效，因為它們無法識別微妙或複雜的違規行為，而攻擊者經常利用這些來在IPv6流量中建立隱蔽的通訊通道。為了自動化IPv6合規性驗證，本文提出了人工智慧驅動的合規檢查引擎（AICCE），這是一個新穎的生成系統，結合了雙架構推理和檢索增強生成（RAG）。由於協議標準的語義編碼進入高維向量空間，與每個查詢相關的規範片段可以高效檢索。基於這一框架，AICCE提供了兩個互補的管道：（i）可解釋性模式，使用平行的LLM代理來做出決策並通過有組織的討論解決爭議，以提高可解釋性和穩健性；（ii）腳本執行模式，將條款轉換為可以快速執行的Python規則，以便進行數據集範圍內的驗證。隨著辯論機制在複雜場景中增強決策可靠性，以及基於腳本的管道降低每樣本延遲，AICCE在對十六個最先進的生成模型進行IPv6封包樣本測試時，實現了高達99%的準確率和F1分數。通過提供一種可擴展、可審計和可通用的機制，以識別動態通訊環境中的常規和隱蔽違規，我們的結果顯示AICCE克服了傳統基於規則的合規檢查系統的盲點。
2604.03330.author: Mohammad Wali Ur Rahman et.al.
2604.03330.authors: Mohammad Wali Ur Rahman, Martin Manuel Lopez, Lamia Tasnim Mim, Carter Farthing, Julius Battle, Kathryn Buckley, Salim Hariri
